description_long: This is an adult human figure with a realistic build, standing upright with arms slightly extended downward and outward. The individual is dressed in a fitted athletic tank top and shorts, both sleeveless and extending to mid-thigh, suitable for sports or casual urban activities. The figure is barefoot, with toes and fingers clearly modeled, and the musculature and anatomical proportions are naturalistic. The face is neutral, with defined features, and the hair is styled close to the scalp, giving a neat and practical appearance. The skin surface is smooth, and the clothing appears to be made of a flexible, fabric-like material. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian.
description: A barefoot adult standing upright in fitted athletic wear, with arms relaxed and hair styled close to the scalp. The figure is realistic and suitable for urban pedestrian scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full front of the athletic outfit with arms slightly extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, body, and the fitted nature of the tank top and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the back of the athletic outfit, with hair close to the scalp.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and the relaxed posture of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top and fitted shorts
